ats_utilities.base.base_registry module¶

base_registry.py

Info

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of CheckerBundle creation.

class ats_utilities.base.base_registry.BaseRegistry[source]¶

Bases: IRegistry[BaseBundle]

Encapsulates core runtime components for simplification of CheckerBundle creation.

It defines:

methods:
create_bundle - Creates a BaseBundle.
create_default_base_bundle - Creates a default BaseBundle.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
classmethod create_bundle(**kwargs: Any) → BaseBundle[source]¶

Creates a BaseBundle.

Parameters:

kwargs – Additional registry-specific orchestration parameters.

Returns:

BaseBundle instance.

Return type:

<BaseBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: info_file must be provided.
ATSValueError: context_bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: info_file must be a string.
ATSTypeError: context_bundle must be a ContextBundle instance.
ATSTypeError: use generator must be a boolean.
classmethod create_default_base_bundle(info_file: str, context_bundle: ContextBundle, use_generator: bool = False) → BaseBundle[source]¶

Creates a default BaseBundle with pre-configured components.

Parameters:

  • info_file (<str>) – Path to the info file.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – ContextBundle instance.

  • use_generator (<bool>) – Whether to use the generator.

Returns:

Default BaseBundle instance.

Return type:

<BaseBundle>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: info_file must be provided.
ATSValueError: context_bundle must be provided.
ATSTypeError: info_file must be a string.
ATSTypeError: context_bundle must be a ContextBundle instance.
ATSTypeError: use generator must be a boolean.
